raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX XXXX {$35000.00} was charged on my Home Depot / Citi Bank credit card at the Home Depot store in XXXX XXXX XXXX. I live in XXXX XXXX and shop in the XXXX store. It looks like washing machine and some sort of straps were purchased. I did not make nor have any knowledge of this purchase. I called their fraud department and started a fraud investigation. About a month later they sent me a letter stating that I made the purchase and had to pay. No explanation! I called again and they sent me to their security department. They asked me a few questions and stated that the investigation could take up to 90 days. On XXXX XXXX I received the same letter stating that their investigation shows that I made the purchase and had to pay. Again no explanation! I have not called them again because the people I speek with do not help. I asked them to block my card and to not send me another one. They sent me another anyway and somebody tried to use that one. Any help you could provide will greatly appreciated. 
Thank You
